pitch_text: Guwahati (ACA/Barsapara), same surface as RR vs MI — pitch 5; square ~65–66 m, straight ~72–75 m, equidistant. Hard, consistent pace and bounce; looks dry under the grass but no moisture — commentators call it a batting paradise; change of pace key for bowlers; early powerplay wickets matter. Small venue sample: defending teams slightly ahead overall. No dew called out; no rain in forecast (but toss and match start delayed ~30+ min due to rain — keep reduced-overs / interruptions in mind).
notes: Match 16: RR won toss, chose to bowl → RCB bat first (team1). Rain: toss delayed ~30 min; further start delay — conditions may be stop-start. Impact pools — RCB: Suyash Sharma, Jacob Bethell, Rasikh Salam Dar, Kanishk Chouhan, Venkatesh Iyer. RR: vaibhav-sooryavanshi, Lhuan-dre Pretorius, Ravi Singh, Shubham Dubey, Tushar Deshpande. Process 1A with --team1-impact Suyash Sharma, --team2-impact vaibhav-sooryavanshi; registry ids (abhinandan-singh, brijesh-sharma); --no-squad-check for cross-franchise / bridge rows.
